raw_consumer_statement:
In XX/XX/XXXX I purchased a vacation package to be taken during the XXXX holiday from XX/XX/XXXX until XX/XX/XXXX, which included hotel stay and a round trip flight for my kids and I. 
The payment was made in full via initial payment and monthly payments. However even though a flight to my destination was provided, a return flight ticket was never provided. 
I had to purchase a XXXX way return ticket for my XXXX kids age XXXX and XXXX and myself in XX/XX/XXXX when our vacation was meant to be over and we needed to vacate the hotel and the country. 
I reached out to the merchant but didn't get a response and I decided to dispute the charges on my citi credit card immediately I got back home. 
Despite citi opening the dispute and me providing all the requested document asked of me by citi card, and the merchant never responding even though they were given a date to respond by, the dispute was closed without a letter of explanation, just a push notification stating I was responsible for the charges. 
I don't understand how I can be responsible for the charges if I have proof showing that I had to buy a XXXX way plane ticket for myself and my kids.
